author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Rocket League – Season 23 Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch
Play Rocket League's Season 23 on Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/rocket-league-switch/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1064-03&utm_id=P1064-03

Season 23 is live with the FIFA World Cup 2026, a new Rocket Pass, and gameplay updates including Demo Spawn Control! Check out quality-of-life improvements like Custom Training Velocity, Ball and Car Speed Graphs, Hitbox Visualization and more. 

#RocketLeague

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales on Nintendo Switch 2: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/the-adventures-of-elliot-the-millennium-tales-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

A brand-new action RPG from the creators of OCTOPATH TRAVELER and BRAVELY DEFAULT, The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales combines stunning HD-2D visuals and action-adventure gameplay for the first time.  

Join the adventurer Elliott and his fairy sidekick Faie as they brave the dangers outside their kingdom to fulfill a thousand-year mission. Unravel the threads of history in this journey across four ages! 

#TheAdventuresofElliott #TheMillenniumTales 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
The Splatoon 3 North American League Show 2026 – Episode 11
What a season! But we're not done yet—playoffs is coming this weekend, June 20-21! Who do you think is taking home the ultimate win? Tell us in the comments!

Tune in to the Splatoon 3 North American League 2026 Playoffs!
- Day 1 livestream on Saturday, June 20 at 12pm PT here: https://www.youtube.com/live/YZ7usmY4xzc
- Day 2 livestream on Sunday, June 21 at 12pm PT here: https://www.youtube.com/live/jggL_EPlH1M

Catch up on previous episodes and livestreams here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2JiZAV5BmDXkhjMHRXksU8m6-1y3LUbi

Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required for online features. Membership auto-renews after initial term at the then-current price unless canceled. Not available in all countries. Internet access required for online features. Terms apply. nintendo.com/purchase-terms/

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: www.nintendo.com/us/whatsnew/splatoon-3-north-american-league-2026/

text:
Disney Dreamlight Valley – Honeyglow Woods Adventure Pack Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Disney Dreamlight Valley: Honeyglow Woods Adventure Pack launches July 8! Play Disney Dreamlight Valley on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/disney-dreamlight-valley-nintendo-switch-2-edition-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1064-02&utm_id=P1064-02 

Explore the Honeyglow Woods and reconnect with Disney's Winnie the Pooh, Eeyore, and Piglet in this brand-new Adventure Pack! Decorate 4 new areas, learn the art of beekeeping, craft all-new items using Golden Honey, and uncover the mystery behind the Everoak Tree. 

#DisneyDreamlightValley #HoneyglowWoods 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Trine 6: Together in Time – Announcement Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Trine 6: Together in Time is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch on September 17, 2026: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/trine-6-together-in-time-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1021-01&utm_id=P1021-01 

Trine 6: Together in Time is a co-op puzzle platformer for 1-4 players. Solve perplexing puzzles, fight cunning creatures, and traverse perilous paths in your adventure through Trine’s fantasy world. 

#NintendoSwitch2 #NintendoSwitch #Trine6
